1_restart_confirmed.patch_location: bot_core.py lines 504-525 — check_entry_gates() call present between Signal() and open_position()
1_restart_confirmed.verdict: Two post-patch restarts confirmed. Patched source confirmed present. Gate behavior differs between the two restarts — see sections below.

2_gate_rejection_log_lines.interpretation: Gate confirmed firing at restart 1 (18:29:31). Zero gate rejections at restart 2 (18:41:26) — mlb-cws-kc with confidence=0.4639 opened without any rejection log. Two distinct residual issues documented below.

trades.issue: ISSUE_A — duplicate intent bypass (see root cause section)
ISSUE_B — no gate rejection log at second restart (see root cause section)

3_sub_0_60_trades_since_restart.verdict: FAIL — 2 sub-0.60 trades opened post-restart. Gate not fully enforcing.

4_valid_entries_since_restart.bridge_still_executing: YES — trade 237 (conf=0.6429) confirms bridge is functional post-restart
4_valid_entries_since_restart.current_status: Bot is now at MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES capacity (3/3: trades 223, 237, 238). All loops show BRIDGE SKIP. No new bridge entries possible until a position closes.

ISSUE_A_trade_236_duplicate_intent_bypas.what_happened: model_bridge emitted TWO intents for the same slug in rapid succession. First intent: BRIDGE GATE PASS (model_bridge log line 19994 at 18:33:14.148), then bot_core check_entry_gates REJECTED (log line 20007 at 18:33:14.622). Second intent: BRIDGE GATE PASS (model_bridge log line 20009 at 18:33:14.936), then trade 236 OPENED (log line 20024 at 18:33:15.416) — NO second check_entry_gates rejection.

evidence.model_bridge_pass_1: line 19994: BRIDGE GATE PASS slug=mlb-mia-det confidence=0.5600
evidence.bot_core_reject_1: line 20007: BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] slug=mlb-mia-det reasons=['confidence_too_low:0.56:0.600']
evidence.model_bridge_pass_2: line 20009: BRIDGE GATE PASS slug=mlb-mia-det confidence=0.5600
evidence.bot_core_open: line 20024: BRIDGE OPEN trade=236 mlb-mia-det BUY_YES @ 0.3317

ISSUE_A_trade_236_duplicate_intent_bypas.likely_cause: get_approved_intents() returns two entries for the same slug (possibly two separate recommendation records for the same market). The first entry is correctly rejected by check_entry_gates(). The second entry passes the duplicate-slug dedup check (slug not in current_open_slugs because no trade was opened), then reaches check_entry_gates() again. For an unknown reason, check_entry_gates() does not reject the second instance — NO rejection log was emitted for the second entry. This suggests the gate may have been bypassed or an execution path was taken that skipped check_entry_gates for the second instance.
ISSUE_A_trade_236_duplicate_intent_bypas.fix_needed: Investigate why get_approved_intents() returns duplicate intents for the same slug, OR add explicit slug dedup to the check_entry_gates rejection path (track rejected slugs within the same bridge loop iteration).

ISSUE_B_trade_238_no_gate_at_restart_2.what_happened: At the 18:41:26 restart, model_bridge passed two intents: mlb-wsh-mil (conf=0.6429) and mlb-cws-kc (conf=0.4639). Trade 237 opened for mlb-wsh-mil correctly. Trade 238 opened for mlb-cws-kc with confidence 0.4639 — NO BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] line anywhere in the log after this restart.

evidence.model_bridge_pass_cws: line 20182: BRIDGE GATE PASS slug=mlb-cws-kc confidence=0.4639
evidence.no_bot_core_rejection: Zero BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] lines after 18:41:26 restart
evidence.bot_core_open: line 20198: BRIDGE OPEN trade=238 mlb-cws-kc BUY_YES @ 0.3920
evidence.patch_still_present: bot_core.py lines 504-525 confirmed present in source (verified read)

possible_causes: (a) DB timing race: after trade 237 was inserted, fetch_open_trades() for the mlb-cws-kc iteration returned 3 open trades (223, 237, 238-pending), triggering MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES cap check and break — BUT no 'BRIDGE CAP HIT' log line was emitted, ruling this out

(b) The 18:41:26 restart used a process that did not load the patched code, despite the source file being correct (e.g., .pyc cache, launcher subprocess path issue, or process that was already in-flight before the restart)
(c) MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE was somehow 0.0 or below 0.4639 at the second restart — cannot confirm or deny from logs alone
(d) An unlogged exception in check_entry_gates() for this specific intent caused silent fall-through — inconsistent with exception handling structure but cannot rule out
ISSUE_B_trade_238_no_gate_at_restart_2.most_likely_cause: (b) — launcher may have restarted with a stale process or cached bytecode. The first restart (18:29:31) correctly loaded the patched code. Something between the two restarts may have caused the second process to use different code.
ISSUE_B_trade_238_no_gate_at_restart_2.fix_needed: Verify the 18:41:26 restart loaded the correct bot_core.py (check if __pycache__/bot_core.cpython-xxx.pyc is stale). If pyc cache is stale, delete it and restart again.

5_overall_verdict.gate_is_live: PARTIAL — confirmed working at restart 1 (18:29:31), not confirmed at restart 2 (18:41:26)
5_overall_verdict.confidence_floor_enforced: PARTIAL — 3 correct rejections confirmed; 2 bypass paths identified
5_overall_verdict.open_positions_note: 3 open trades (223 conf=0.3353, 237 conf=0.6429, 238 conf=0.4639). Trades 223 and 238 are sub-floor but open. Gate is entry-only — they will run to existing exit conditions.
5_overall_verdict.conclusion: Gate patch is confirmed in source and fires correctly in at least some paths, but two distinct bypass mechanisms allowed sub-0.60 trades through: (A) duplicate intents for the same slug bypass the gate on the second instance; (B) the 18:41:26 restart produced no gate rejections at all for a sub-0.60 intent — most likely a stale bytecode cache or process timing issue.
5_overall_verdict.next_action: queue_fix — two separate issues to address: (A) add slug dedup to the bridge rejection path or investigate why get_approved_intents() returns duplicate slugs; (B) clear __pycache__ and do a fresh restart to ensure patched .py is the code actually running

immediate_operator_action_recommended.step_1: Delete or verify __pycache__/bot_core.cpython-*.pyc to eliminate bytecode cache as a factor
immediate_operator_action_recommended.step_2: Restart bot_core.py cleanly after cache clear
